---
title: "In class 06/15/2026"
author: "J Lacasa"
date: "2026-06-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Random vars

```{r}
# take a distribution
y <- rnorm(10^6, mean = 0, sd = sqrt(100))
b <- rnorm(4, mean = 0, sd = sqrt(100))
data.frame(y = y) |> 
  ggplot(aes(y))+
  geom_histogram()+
  geom_point(aes(y = 0, x = b), data = data.frame(b=b), color ="tomato")
```
